_comment: Source-of-truth registry for shared Jarvis KBs (see docs/kb-standards.md §6). Drives BOTH n8n ingestion and the chat agent's list_kbs/search_kb tools. Add a KB = add an entry here. All KBs embed with bge-m3 (1024-dim, Cosine) via LiteLLM.

kbs.name: kb_homelab_docs
kbs.description: Homelab infrastructure docs — the Docker stack services, deployment on the jarvis server, networking/Traefik/SSO, monitoring/alerting, and the AI stack (LiteLLM, Qdrant, n8n, OpenWebUI, ComfyUI). Use for questions about how the homelab is built, configured, or operated.

kbs.name: kb_trading_docs
kbs.description: Trading engine documentation and design — system architecture, per-app and library docs, migration notes, and platform-services integration for the trading system. Use for questions about the trading engine's design, components, or how it uses the Jarvis platform.

kbs.name: kb_design_docs
kbs.description: Product and business design documentation — architecture, requirements, terminology/glossary, business and marketing material, and patents. Use for questions about product vision, requirements, business strategy, or defined terms.

kbs.name: kb_apollo_docs
kbs.description: Apollo app documentation — design, architecture, and usage docs for the Apollo application (README, CLAUDE.md, and the docs/ tree of the apollo repo). Use for questions about how Apollo works, its components, or its memory/KB conventions.

kbs.name: kb_discord_curator_docs
kbs.description: discord-curator app documentation — design, architecture, roadmap, setup/deploy, and the n8n harvest+ingest flow design for the Discord-to-KB curation bot (the 'Librarian'). Use for questions about how discord-curator works, its pipeline, channels/links data model, or its components.

kbs.name: kb_research_ai_ml
kbs.description: Curated AI/ML research — links (YouTube talks, articles, papers, repos, docs) harvested from the team's Discord AI/ML channels and credibility-filtered. Use for questions about AI/ML tools, models, agents, techniques, and notable resources the team is tracking.

kbs.name: kb_research_trading
kbs.description: Curated trading research — links harvested from the team's Discord trading channels and credibility-filtered (ephemeral 'stocks this week' content excluded). Use for questions about trading strategies, market-analysis tools, indicators, and notable trading resources the team is tracking.

kbs.name: kb_mddocsviewer_docs
kbs.description: md-docs-viewer app documentation — the docs/ tree and README for the Next.js markdown-docs viewer app. Use for questions about how md-docs-viewer works, its setup, or its components.
